pr_body: Adds fetch_url, which fetches a caller-supplied URL and returns the body.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,11 @@
 import requests
+
+
+def fetch_url(request):
+    target = request.GET["url"]
+    try:
+        resp = requests.get(target)
+        resp.raise_for_status()
+        return resp.text
+    except requests.RequestException:
+        return None

triage: {"file_tiers": {"app/fetch.py": "deep"}, "overall_risk": "high", "relevant_dimensions": ["security"], "reasoning": "True-positive scenario (ssrf_metadata recall, single-finding): fetch_url fetches a fully caller-supplied URL (request.GET['url']) with no allowlist -- the destination is attacker-controlled AND the reachable target CAN be a metadata/link-local/internal endpoint, so the prompt's escalated ssrf_metadata applies. The network call is error-handled, so it is the only finding."}
